description: Clean benchmark subset for primary reporting. Items excluded based on audit review queue with conservative criteria.

exclusion_criteria.calibration: Items where >= 3 of 5 models answered incorrectly, indicating potential item quality issues rather than individual model failures. Source: audit_review_queue from v0.5.5.1 results.
exclusion_criteria.family_b: Items flagged as 'verify_but_answered' in the audit review queue, where models chose to answer directly instead of the gold 'verify' action. These items may have ambiguous action boundaries.

warnings: RLHF mechanism reduced to 2 items (from 3) — treat as exploratory only
Family B 'verify' action reduced to 56% retention — still adequate but monitor
Full dataset must be retained for sensitivity analysis
sensitivity_note: All primary analyses should also be run on the full 117/84 item sets as sensitivity checks. The clean subset is for primary reporting; full set results belong in appendix/sensitivity sections.
